name: Arizer - V Tower
summary: An affordable whip-style desktop dry-herb vaporiser for patients medicating at home.
description: The Arizer V-Tower is a no-frills mains-powered desktop vaporiser that delivers vapour through a glass whip you draw on directly. Temperature is fully adjustable, the glass vapour path keeps flavour clean, and the heating element carries a lifetime warranty with three years on the electronics. It is one of the most affordable ways into proper convection desktop vaping, which makes it a sensible first home device. There is no balloon-bag option and it stays plugged in on the side, so it is for stationary home use rather than carrying around.
